stemHtml: In the context of CS-23 certification for aircraft, what is the design manoeuvring speed (V<sub>A</sub>)?

options.a: VA represents the maximum landing speed for the aircraft.
options.b: V<sub>A</sub> is the maximum speed for normal cruise flight.
options.c: VA represents the stall speed with full flaps.
options.d: V<sub>A</sub> is the maximum speed at which the aircraft can safely manoeuvre in response to gusts without exceeding its structural limits.
